tasks.subject: Task 0: County polygons in geo.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bundle county polygons + pure-Python point-in-polygon.

**Files:** geo.py, scripts/build_county_polygons.py, _data/county_polygons.parquet, tests/test_geo.py, pyproject.toml

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_geo.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/geo.py", "scripts/build_county_polygons.py", "src/smoke_sense/_data/county_polygons.parquet", "tests/test_geo.py", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_geo.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["point_in_polygon Polygon/MultiPolygon/holes/bbox-but-outside", "county_polygon + KeyError", "parquet built and loadable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: PurpleAir 429 backoff (_get)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Route PurpleAir GETs through a `_get` helper with 429 backoff.

**Files:** providers/purpleair.py, tests/test_providers_purpleair.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "tests/test_providers_purpleair.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_get retries on 429, raises after max", "_list_sensors/_get_history via _get; 400 reaches chunker"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: PurpleAir sensor filtering
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Filter sensors (outdoor + activity overlap + polygon) before history calls.

**Files:** providers/purpleair.py, tests/test_providers_purpleair.py

**Verify:** `uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v` then `uv run pytest -q`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/smoke_sense/providers/purpleair.py", "tests/test_providers_purpleair.py"], "verifyCommand": "uv run pytest tests/test_providers_purpleair.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_list_sensors location_type=0 + last_seen/date_created", "_filter_sensors overlap+in-polygon only", "fetch filters; empty->empty_frame"]}
```
